metadata.title: Jhonatan Florez — Full Stack Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Jhonatan Florez, a Full Stack Engineer specialized in Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Docker, PostgreSQL, AI systems and cloud infrastructure.

hero.name: JHONATAN FLOREZ
hero.role: Full Stack Engineer — AI Systems & Automation
hero.valueProposition: I design and build production-grade systems that combine clean architecture, automation, and AI to solve real business problems.

about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph: I partner with teams to turn complex requirements into reliable software: scalable backends, polished interfaces, and infrastructure that does not wake you up at 3am.

integro.challenge: Lead the development of scalable fullstack solutions and AI automations for enterprise clients.
integro.action1: Designed and developed web applications with Next.js, TypeScript and clean architectures.
integro.action2: Implemented AI automation systems to optimize business processes.
integro.action3: Managed cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines on Github actions.
integro.result1: Delivered multiple enterprise projects with high impact.
integro.result2: 3+ years of continuous experience at the company.

dms.challenge: Develop quality software for diverse clients under tight deadlines.
dms.action1: Developed fullstack applications with React, Node.js and C#.
dms.action2: Collaborated on database architecture and performance optimization.

confacaldas.challenge: Modernize internal systems and improve digital experience for users.
confacaldas.action1: Developed responsive web interfaces with React.
confacaldas.action2: Implemented RESTful APIs and integrations with legacy systems.
confacaldas.result1: Improved user experience on internal platforms.

syqual10.challenge: Build scalable software solutions for enterprise clients.
syqual10.action1: Developed web applications with React and Angular.
syqual10.action2: Implemented backend with Node.js and NoSQL databases.

2share.challenge: Develop SharePoint solutions for corporate clients.
2share.action1: Programmed custom web parts and SharePoint solutions.

doctus.challenge: Internship, creating software and verifying quality processes.
doctus.action1: Built user interfaces with .NET and Angular.
doctus.action2: Developed backend APIs and services with Node.js.

ilaxus.problem: Businesses need to automate repetitive processes and integrate AI into their workflows, but lack the technical expertise to implement it.
ilaxus.solution: AI automation agency that designs and implements custom solutions using n8n, Make, OpenAI and other no-code/low-code tools to optimize business processes.
ilaxus.impact: Companies that automate their processes with AI, reducing operational time and increasing efficiency.

aiChatbot.problem: In many companies, traditional chatbots cannot handle complex queries or provide personalized experiences.
aiChatbot.solution: Developed an advanced AI chatbot using cutting-edge language models, integrated with internal systems to provide accurate and personalized responses.
aiChatbot.impact: Improved customer satisfaction and reduced response times.

openclaw.problem: Loss of time and resources on repetitive tasks that could be automated with AI agents.
openclaw.solution: Developed an AI agent system that automates complex tasks by integrating language models with automation tools.
openclaw.impact: Improved operational efficiency and reduced execution time.

langPlatform.problem: There is no efficient method for everyone to learn English in their own way and pace, with content relevant to their interests and needs.
langPlatform.solution: Developed an AI-powered language learning platform that personalizes content and learning activities based on each user's interests, level and goals.
langPlatform.impact: Users can learn English more effectively and engagingly, with content relevant to their needs.
